message:
Fix encoded project name parsing: no blanks, no hyphens, no hierarchies

- parseProjectName now filters empty segments from dot-directory encoding
  (-Users-jesse--clank → clank instead of -clank)
- Falls back to last segment when path is too short
  (-Users-jesse → jesse instead of empty)
- Remove sub-project prefix matching from discoverUserProjects — it
  created false hierarchies (/clank/skills) in multi-user layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
